scripts.deploy:openai-chat: npx supabase functions deploy openai-chat --project-ref ${SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF:?Set SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF}
scripts.deploy:extract-label: npx supabase functions deploy extract-label --project-ref ${SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF:?Set SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF}
scripts.deploy:send-push: npx supabase functions deploy send-push --project-ref ${SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF:?Set SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF}
scripts.deploy:cron-dispatch-push: npx supabase functions deploy cron-dispatch-push --project-ref ${SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF:?Set SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF}
scripts.deploy:functions: npm run deploy:openai-chat && npm run deploy:extract-label && npm run deploy:send-push && npm run deploy:cron-dispatch-push
